title: Pithampur Heat Wave
lead: Pithampur is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.74. This event has a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Pithampur is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 12.1 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 24%, which is relatively low, and the wind speed is 3.1 km/h. 
 The HDD is at 0.0 GG, indicating no heating degree days, while the CDD is significantly high, emphasizing the severity of the heat wave.
conclusion: Implement immediate heat wave mitigation measures to ensure public safety.
agri_impact: Crop damage likely due to heat
